## Overview

This chapter analyses potyvirus host ranges as interaction networks.
For fully interactive exploration — including GBIF taxonomy resolution,
GLOBI interaction queries, and multilayer network metrics — launch the
companion Shiny app:

```r
shiny::runApp("shiny/bionexus/")
```
